mapper.select: select id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status, recruit_stage, interview_time, interview_remark from employment_user where id = #{id}

select id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status, recruit_stage, interview_time, interview_remark from employment_user where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into employment_user
id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status, recruit_stage, interview_time, interview_remark,
#{id}, #{employmentId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{introduce}, #{resume}, #{createTime}, #{deleted}, #{replyTime}, #{replyContent}, #{replyUser}, #{type}, #{replyStatus}, #{userStatus}, #{recruitStage}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewRemark},

insert into employment_user( id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status, recruit_stage, interview_time, interview_remark ) values
( #{entity.id}, #{entity.employmentId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.introduce}, #{entity.resume}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUser}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.replyStatus}, #{entity.userStatus}, #{entity.recruitStage}, #{entity.interviewTime}, #{entity.interviewRemark} )

insert into employment_user( employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status, recruit_stage, interview_time, interview_remark ) values
( #{entity.employmentId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.introduce}, #{entity.resume}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUser}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.replyStatus}, #{entity.userStatus}, #{entity.recruitStage}, #{entity.interviewTime}, #{entity.interviewRemark} )
on duplicate key update employment_id = values(employment_id), user_id = values(user_id), name = values(name), phone = values(phone), introduce = values(introduce), resume = values(resume), create_time = values(create_time), deleted = values(deleted), reply_time = values(reply_time), reply_content = values(reply_content), reply_user = values(reply_user), reply_status = values(reply_status), user_status = values(user_status), recruit_stage = values(recruit_stage), interview_time = values(interview_time), interview_remark = values(interview_remark)
mapper.select: select count(*) from employment_user where deleted = 0
select count(*) from employment_user where deleted = 0 and reply_status = #{replyStatus}
mapper.delete:
delete from employment_user where user_id = #{userId} and employment_id = #{employmentId}
and type = #{type}
